---
species: "Euspira heros"
accepted_code: "EUHE"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Northern moon snail"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Large spherical shell with large ear-shaped operculum" 
image: '/header_images/moonsnail.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo by Jeff Goddard' 
categories:
  - gastropods
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "160315"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
